Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Support Needed for Book Distribution

Social · asked by user [] · 2009-07-21 · 0 answers
I am a local devotee living in the Dallas, Texas, area and would like to distribute Srila Prabhupadas books in the downtown Dallas area one day a week. Unfortunately, due to the bad economy, jobs are very difficult to come by and thus I cannot afford to even buy a few cases of Prabhupadas books. I have a connection with Krishna Books Incorporated (printing Prabhupadas original books), and they told me that they would sell me some cases of Srila Prabhupadas small books, like Perfection of Yoga and Beyond Birth and Death at a discounted rate. I might be able to get around 1,000 to 1,500 of Prabhupadas small books for something like $200 dollars. Would anyone be willing to help me in this regard, perhaps donating a little bit of money?

Or, even better, if you happen to have a few spare cases of Srila Prabhupadas books lying around, if you would like to mail them to my mailing address, I promise you I will distribute them. Anyway, I very much want to distribute Srila Prabhupadas books, and am looking for ways to have books sponsored or provided to me. If you are interested, please email me at ccananza@hotmail.com

Thank you
